content.en:
This time, Ye Tian entered the Black Long River, and at the moment of collapse and fall, he used his copying talent to perceive the other party's talent.

Mastery Ancestor: Destruction

Obviously.

This creature possessed a control-level ancestral endowment that surpassed the legendary-level ancestral endowment, and it was also a level that Ye Tian had never seen before.

"Copy!"

Ye Tian copied it instantly.

Due to the peculiarity of the copy body, even if the copy body collapses, the copy talents are connected, so the copy talent will not be able to obtain the copied talent because the copy body has fallen.

However, Ye Tian was shocked.

He, did not fully replicate successfully.

Under normal circumstances, with his current cultivation and ability to copy his innate ability, copying the Legendary-level Ancestral Fu was successfully copied almost instantly, while the Legendary-level Ancestral Fu had not been directly copied, so he didn't know the situation.

But now, he tried to copy this mastery-level Destruction Ancestral Fu, and only one in a hundred million, and the speed of copying was too slow and too slow.

Time passed slowly, and the replication process continued.

However, when Ye Tian copied to one in 10,000, he was directly stuck. 18

Ye Tian tried to get another replica body to go to the black river to contact the creature, but even if he got close, the replication process was still stuck.

At this time, he knew very well that the copying process was stuck and had nothing to do with the distance.

"The level of the copying talent is low, it should not be as good as the mastery-level ancestor, but the copying talent is very special, so it can copy one-ten-thousandth of the control-level destruction ancestor. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

If you want to replicate it into a complete control-level Destruction Ancestral Fu, the way to do it is to upgrade the Replication Talent again.

However, this is very difficult.

If the copyable talent is not upgraded, he will not be able to successfully copy this mastery-level Destruction Ancestral Gift.

"Fortunately, I've already copied the Master-level Destruction Ancestral Fu, and even if that creature leaves here, the replication process won't be broken. "

Ye Tian has confirmed that he has tried, so as long as the replication starts, it will not be completely broken, and no matter how far away it is, it can be replicated successfully.

Now, Ye Tian only needs to upgrade the copying talent.

Before, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to improve the copying talent, because he was not in a hurry, he had not encountered a talent that he could not copy, so whether the copying talent was upgraded or not had little impact

But this time, he really wanted to raise the level of the copying talent.

If you want to increase the level of the copy talent, you must find a treasure that can increase the copy talent, and this requires luck.

Of course, if you encounter a treasure that can increase the level of the copy talent, the copy talent will be sensitive.

In other words, he needs to keep searching in the Void Zone, and he has walked all over the Void Zone, so he doesn't believe in Bao Wei who has not improved his copying talent.

"Next, let's look for a treasure that can help you copy your talent. 丆

Ye Tian said darkly.

As the Lord of the Peak Legend Realm, Ye Tian's speed is so fast, as long as he has coordinates, he can shuttle anywhere in the Void Region.

Ye Tian was ready to step into every corner of the Eternal Sea first.

In the following days, Ye Tian left only one copy body in the Origin Realm, and the other copy bodies all went out and began to search for treasures that could improve the copy talent in the countless eternal seas in the Void Region.

And just like that, one eternal epoch after another passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how long he had been looking, he had already searched for countless places, but he didn't perceive any treasures that could improve his copying talent, so he could only continue to look for them.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a void area, and suddenly sensed a slight throbbing of the copying talent.

Suddenly, Ye Tian was extremely excited.

"Isn't it ......"

He immediately senses the direction in which the copy talent throbs.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew over slowly, and the emotions of joy and excitement came.

He knew that the treasure that allowed the copying talent to be promoted and upgraded was around here.

Suddenly, he sensed a special world.

Moreover, there are many cultivators stationed here.

In addition, there are several Legendary Realm Lords here.

When Ye Tian arrived, there was immediately a Rising Legendary Realm Lord who appeared here.

"I've seen the Endless Lord!"

The Legendary Realm Lord said respectfully.

Ye Tian recognized the Legendary Realm Lord in front of him, the Zhenyue Lord from the Lei Yan Holy Land.

At this moment, Ye Tian understood that this was a territory of the Lei Yan Holy Land.

The Lei Yan Holy Land is one of the top forces in the Void Region, with forces spread across many Eternal Seas, and there are three Peak Legendary Realm Lords alone, and there are more than sixty Legendary Realm Lords.

Moreover, the Thunder Flame Holy Land was established by the Thunder Flame Lord.

The strength of Lord Lei Yan is very strong, but it is not an ordinary peak Legendary Realm lord, it is suspected to be a fourth-level peak Legendary Realm lord, and the strength of Lord Yunsen is on par

In the Void Area, there are only a few Peak Legendary Realm Lords who are suspected to be at the fourth level, and Lord Lei Yan is one of them.

To be honest, Ye Tian didn't want to offend Lord Lei Yan, because his current strength was not as good as Lord Lei Yan.

But here is the treasure he needs.

He didn't reveal his purpose, and simply said a few words to Lord Zhenyue, and left here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian inquired carefully and knew what kind of place it was.

"Spirit Metaverse!"

This is a very peculiar world, and it is very easy to grow all kinds of rare medicines in this world, so the Lei Yan Holy Land has planted countless monsters and Kui treasures in the Spirit Yuan Realm.

Due to the importance of this place, the 730 Thunder Flame Holy Land sent several Legendary Realm Lords to guard here, and once something went wrong, the Legendary Realm Lords of the Thunder Flame Holy Land would arrive here in an instant.

At this time, Ye Tian was thinking about what to do?

Directly asked Lord Lei Yan to buy that treasure, Lord Lei Yan would even be suspicious, so he detained the treasure and studied it slowly, thinking that it was a great opportunity, and he would not let it out easily.

In that case, it would be very difficult for him to get it.

The second option is to sneak in and steal the artifact.

"Then steal it, I can disguise myself as a peak Legendary Realm lord and sneak in, even if Lord Lei Yan is a fourth-level peak Legendary Realm lord, it is difficult to find out who did it, even if there is a suspicion, it is just a suspicion."

Ye Tian said darkly.

And who is disguised?

"Just disguise yourself as the Illusory Clan! Once you disguise yourself as the Illusory Clan, Lord Lei Yan will definitely be confused, this is a creature that only exists in the Rising Realm, and Lord Lei Yan will definitely have no way of knowing that I did it. "

Thinking of this, Ye Tian felt that disguising himself as the Illusory Clan was the best way.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately copied the body of a Phantom Clan, and among the Phantom Clan, there was also a peak Legendary Realm Lord level, it was just the weakest one, but it was enough!

Soon, a Shadow Clan whose strength was at the peak of the first level Legendary Realm Lord level successfully condensed. _
